summary.intent: Implement task #267: the framework-agnostic TreeView core state machine in ars-components (WAI-ARIA tree pattern with expand/collapse, selection, keyboard nav, typeahead, ARIA wiring, and a DnD reorder variant), with spec-as-contract sync and full Codex review loop.
summary.outcome: TreeView core fully implemented with 139+ unit tests, 26 snapshots, proptest, spec-conformance, ~98% line coverage, and 7 rounds of Codex review (33+ findings addressed). PR #695 opened; round 7 fixes committed but not yet pushed at session end.

repo: TreeCollection::nodes() / keys() return VISIBLE-ONLY nodes (iterates visible_indices); ExpandAll and typeahead must use all_nodes() / all_keys() which had to be added to ars-collections.
Key does not implement Borrow<str> — spec's String-based node identity cannot compile against BTreeSet<Key>; every component uses Key (Int/String/Uuid) as canonical identity.
selection::Set is #[non_exhaustive] — match arms require a catch-all (_) pattern.

selection::State::select already rejects disabled keys; the component only needs to seed disabled_keys and set DisabledBehavior::FocusOnly so disabled nodes remain typeahead-reachable but non-selectable.
EffectName has a blanket impl — manual impl conflicts; never implement it explicitly.
All sibling navigation/input components implement on_props_changed for controlled-prop syncing; missing it means controlled updates (selected, expanded, dnd_enabled) are silently ignored.

Controlled binding changes (selection, expansion) require on_change callbacks + Effect variants (Effect::SelectionChange, Effect::ExpansionChange) mirroring the checkbox_group pattern — Bindable::set() only updates internal value, parent never learns of change request otherwise.
ars_collections::typeahead::State is the canonical multi-char locale-aware typeahead; feature-gated, uses collection text_value, requires now_ms clock; all select/listbox/menu components use it.
spec-compile-snippets runs syn::parse_file (syntax check only, no type resolution) — spec code blocks only need to parse, not type-check across dependent blocks.
CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md; .agents/ and .claude/ skill files are hardlinked (same inode) — editing one updates both.
Pre-commit hook re-stages all tracked modified files, collapsing intended split commits into one.
WAI-ARIA APG tree pattern requires no-wrap arrow navigation (Down/Up stop at last/first, no wrap) — deliberate departure from earlier wraparound design.
aria-selected must be omitted entirely for non-selectable nodes (disabled + SelectionMode::None), not emitted as false.
Set::All must be resolved to concrete selectable keys in sanitize_selection — leaving it unresolved bypasses the disabled-key filter.
IME composition events (is_composing: true) must suppress typeahead dispatch to avoid firing during CJK/etc. input.
DragStart must reject source nodes hidden under collapsed parents (requires checking the live visible set, not just the collection's structural data).

code.finding: visible_keys() sits in impl<T: CollectionItem> block; pure-read accessors with no bound (all_nodes, all_keys) belong in the no-bound impl<T> block at lines 134-175.
selection::State::select already rejects disabled keys — component only needs to seed disabled_keys and set DisabledBehavior to get correct behavior.
effective_selection_mode must be computed from both props.selection_mode and props.items' collective has_children flags; mode must also be re-derived in SyncProps when items or mode prop changes.

process_typeahead must clone ctx.items and apply ctx.expanded via set_expanded (reconciled_items) before calling typeahead::State::process_char_with_locale — otherwise typeahead searches construction-time expansion snapshot, not live state.

Canonical pattern for controlled change notification: Props::on_change Callback + Effect::ValueChange + a *_change_effect PendingEffect that invokes the callback; uncontrolled path calls binding.set(), controlled path emits the effect only.

workflow: TDD strictly enforced: write failing tests first, confirm red, then implement, confirm green — even for audit-phase findings mid-implementation.

cargo xci-fast runs 10 gates (tests, clippy -D warnings, fmt, spec validate, compile-snippets, insta --unreferenced=reject, spec-conformance, proptest, doc, coverage) and must pass before every commit.
Codex review loop is mandatory until thumbs-up: poll reactions, fetch unresolved threads, fix with regression tests, reply with commit+test refs, resolve threads, re-trigger @codex review.
snapshot-reviewed label must be re-applied on every commit that touches .snap files.
Spec (tree-view.md) must be synced in the same commit as code changes — spec is the authoritative contract.
Mandatory pre-PR mutation gate removed for agnostic components per user decision; surviving mutants are triaged when Nightly CI surfaces them.
cargo xtask spec validate checks frontmatter/manifest; compile-snippets runs syn::parse_file on all ```rust blocks excluding no_check — only syntax validity required.
Coverage target: ~98% line/region for new agnostic components; residual misses should be defensive/unreachable branches only.
Codex review findings trend: 10→9→7→7→8→6→4 — later rounds surface progressively narrower edge cases (IME, Set::All, hidden-node DnD) rather than core defects.

friction: TreeCollection::nodes() visible-only semantics were not obvious from the name — caused silent correctness bug in ExpandAll and typeahead; required adding all_nodes()/all_keys() to ars-collections.
Key not implementing Borrow<str> meant the entire spec's String-based node identity API was uncompilable — required Key-wide spec rewrite as part of the task.
Pre-commit hook re-stages all tracked files, silently collapsing intended two-commit split into one.
zsh ${!arr[@]} array syntax failed in bash subcommands — required bash <<'SCRIPT' heredoc workaround.
E0716 temporary dropped error in proptest root_attrs call — required let binding for AttrMap temporary.
selection::Set being #[non_exhaustive] was discovered only at compile time during match exhaustiveness check.
Stale background wakeups fired after mutation rerun was cancelled, creating confusing continuation prompts.

7 rounds of Codex review (33+ findings) required before convergence — each round required: code fix, TDD tests, spec sync, validation suite, commit+push, inline replies, thread resolution, re-trigger.
reconciled_items helper (cloning ctx.items + applying ctx.expanded) is O(n) per typeahead keystroke — necessary correctness fix but introduces allocation on each character.
AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md symlink relationship not obvious; required symlink resolution before editing.
open_items: Mutation gate: 6 MISSED + 2 timeouts from first run; killer tests added but rerun was cancelled per user decision — Nightly CI will surface and triage surviving mutants.

Adapter tasks #366 (TreeView Leptos adapter) and #509 (TreeView Dioxus adapter) pending — DOM hit-testing, pointer geometry, hover-expand timer (500ms), use_drag/use_drop wiring, DraggableCollection/DroppableCollection trait impls.
PR #695 awaiting Codex 👍 after round 7 (commit pushed mid-session); issue #267 cannot be closed until merged + CI green + Codex approval.

Round-7 commit (on_selection_change/on_expansion_change callbacks + Effect::SelectionChange/ExpansionChange + R7-4 leaf toggle + R7-1 drag cancel on hide) was implemented but not yet pushed at session end.
reconciled_items clones ctx.items on every typeahead keystroke — acceptable for now but worth profiling if trees grow large.
spec/components/navigation/tree-view.md §5 (Lazy Loading) and §6 (Renamable Nodes) variant sections still use out-of-spec no_check blocks — full implementation deferred to future tasks.
